# Arya Teja Rudraraju

> AI Agent Engineer & Systems Builder. Specializing in 0→1 AI product development, LLM reasoning, and Agentic workflows. Based in Dallas, TX.

I bridge the gap between AI research and engineering, building production-ready autonomous systems.

## Key Projects

- **LeSearch AI**: AI-native research workspace. (Active, 50+ users)
- **mconnect**: Open source tool connecting terminals to the web.
- **Pilvi Systems**: Enterprise AI automation.

## Core Competencies

- **Agent Frameworks**: LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI, Anthropic.
- **Engineering**: Next.js, Python, TypeScript, Rust, Supabase, Vector Databases.
- **Systems**: Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS.
- **Security**: AI Security, Prompt Injection Mitigation, Governance.
